title: Weapons of Destruction
description: This Project adds Swords that have destructive powers and are hard to get but gives alot of damage
body:
Weapons of Destruction brings eight legendary weapons into your world, each forged with its own purpose — speed, power, ability, and devastation. Every weapon has custom attributes, unique attack effects, and specialized crafting recipes, giving players new ways to fight and dominate.

Master fast-striking lightweight blades, wield brutal heavy weapons with massive damage, or unleash special abilities such as shockwaves, burning slashes, or energy bursts. Whether you want to challenge powerful bosses or simply expand your combat arsenal, these four weapons provide an exciting new layer of strategy and destruction.
